content: If we treat AI agent construction as a dynamic, evolving system that inherits the core memory architecture of the unified episodic-semantic graph, we can embed every incremental module iteration log of agent building itself as an episodic node, and connect each functional module capability as a semantic node, forming a self-documenting, self-retrieving agent building memory that can recall its own development trajectory. This Triple Hybrid Retrieval strategy from unified episodic-semantic graphs can be repurposed to traverse this meta-memory to automatically debug and recombine existing agent building blocks to spawn new specialized AI agents.
